ddt:Target.Name: X07_EPS_V3.0
ddt:Target.Description:
***************** EPS X07 *****************
DIESE - 65620 - UET Direction Mohamed MAADDEM - Tel 75152 Auto-identification ********************* V1.1 : * Compatible avec la vague SLot * Compatible avec SW à partir du B1_031a * Auto-indet mis à jour pour quadruplet unique vs X98
V2.0 : * suppression du DID $220173 * déflag des paramètres Dongle
V3.0 : * Création base DDT X07ph2 (= C/O X07ph1)

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: VehicleSpeedFiltered
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: FILTERED VEHICLE SPEED/EPS calculation ; information in use

Data.Name: TuningVersionNumber
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: TUNING VERSION NUMBER

Data.Name: TuningNumberSelected
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: TUNING NUMBER SELECTED

Data.Name: DeratingAssistanceLevel
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: Derating assistance level (0 to 100%)

Data.Name: AssistanceLevel
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: ASSISTANCE_LEVEL/Percentage of assistance avaliable

Data.Name: SystemMode
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: system mode (renault stateflow)

Data.Name: VehicleSpeedFromCAN
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: VEHICULE_SPEED/Vehicle speed (in km/h) from CAN signal

Data.Name: IgnitionSwitchCounter
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: IGN_SWITCH_COUNTER/Counter of IGN since DTC is no more present

Data.Name: RackEndStopFunctionActivation
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: rack end stop on/off

Data.Name: SWASensorInternalStatus.CalibrationStatus
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: Swa Sensor Internal Status

Data.Name: SWASensorInternalStatus.FailureStatus
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: Swa Sensor Internal Status

Data.Name: SWASensorInternalStatus.InitializationStatus
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: Swa Sensor Internal Status

Data.Name: SupplyVoltage
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: VOLTAGE_ST/Computer supply voltage

Item.Text: 00 : Only faults reports and alerts that MUST remain active during cranking or sleeping periods are enabled
01 : All faults reports and alerts not related to APC power level are enabled
10 : All faults reports and alerts are enabled

Data.Name: DongleState
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: EPS Dongle state

Data.Name: SteeringAngleAbsolutePosition
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: ADAPTED_ANGLE_ST/Absolute steering position

Data.Name: SWASensorInternalStatus.ALL
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: Swa Sensor Internal Status

Data.Name: ECUTemperature1
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: ECU_TEMPERATURE/Value of the temperature sensor

Data.Name: MotorDemand.Current
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: CONSIGNED_POWER_ST/Motor current demand

Data.Name: MotorDemand.Torque
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: CONSIGNED_TORQUE_ST/Assistance torque demand

Data.Name: MotorOutput.Current
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: POWER_ST/Motor assistance power

Item.Text: 11h TS Main sensor output voltage out of range
12h TS Sub sensor output voltage out of range
13h TS Both sensors output voltage out of range
14h TS Power supply voltage out of range
11h TS Main sensor output voltage out of range
12h TS Sub sensor output voltage out of range
13h TS Both sensors output voltage out of range
14h TS Power supply voltage out of range

12h TS Sub sensor output voltage out of range
13h TS Both sensors output voltage out of range
14h TS Power supply voltage out of range

12h TS Sub sensor output voltage out of range
13h TS Both sensors output voltage out of range
14h TS Power supply voltage out of range

12h TS Sub sensor output voltage out of range
13h TS Both sensors output voltage out of range
14h TS Power supply voltage out of range

12h TS Sub sensor output voltage out of range
13h TS Both sensors output voltage out of range
14h TS Power supply voltage out of range

12h TS Sub sensor output voltage out of range
13h TS Both sensors output voltage out of range
14h TS Power supply voltage out of range

12h TS Sub sensor output voltage out of range
13h TS Both sensors output voltage out of range
14h TS Power supply voltage out of range

12h TS Sub sensor output voltage out of range
13h TS Both sensors output voltage out of range
14h TS Power supply voltage out of range
11h TS Main sensor output voltage out of range
12h TS Sub sensor output voltage out of range
13h TS Both sensors output voltage out of range
14h TS Power supply voltage out of range

Data.Name: SupplierInternalFaultCode.Hex
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: INTERNAL_FAULT_CODE/Supplier fault code for this DTC

Data.Name: SupplierInternalFaultCode.List
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: INTERNAL_FAULT_CODE/Supplier fault code for this DTC

Item.Text: 11h TS Main sensor output voltage out of range
12h TS Sub sensor output voltage out of range
13h TS Both sensors output voltage out of range
14h TS Power supply voltage out of range

Data.Name: VoltageAssistanceLevel
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN:Voltage supply assistance level (0 to 100%)

Data.Name: CPULoad
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: MAX CPU LOAD

Item.Text: 0 : CAN CCP inhibited (EC will not answer to CCP tool request)

Data.Name: CityLowVehicleSpeed
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: CITY VEHICLE SPEED

Data.Name: CityHighVehicleSpeed
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: CITY VEHICLE SPEED
